summary: Iteration 48 - Pricing Hub Overhaul testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Pricing Hub UI verified with all features working. One database configuration issue found: Homepage 'Programs' section title still shows 'Flagship Programs' instead of 'Programs' - needs admin update.

issues: Title shows 'Flagship Programs' instead of 'Programs' - this is a DATABASE CONFIG issue in homepage_sections[4].title, not a code bug

action_items: Update homepage_sections[4].title from 'Flagship Programs' to 'Programs' via Admin > Homepage tab or API
critical_code_review_comments: ProgramsSection.jsx line 116: `hasTiers = program.is_flagship && tiers.length > 0` - tier selector requires is_flagship=true, all current programs have is_flagship=false
This is intentional design - tier selectors only show for flagship programs
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed programs/sessions automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified the rewritten Pricing Hub with: (1) Programs table with Show/Price/Tiers toggles, (2) Each tier row has full offer pricing (Offer AED/INR/USD + Offer Badge), (3) Duration dropdown presets (2 Days, 3 Days, 7 Days, 1 Month, etc.), (4) Add/Remove tiers working, (5) Add Program/Session buttons working, (6) Sessions table has Offer AED/INR/USD + Offer Badge columns, (7) Save All persists changes. The homepage title 'Flagship Programs' vs 'Programs' is a database config issue.

verified: Table columns: Name/Duration, Show, Price, Tiers, AED, INR, USD, Offer AED, Offer INR, Offer USD, Offer Badge
Programs with tiers show tier rows (no base 0/0/0 row)
Programs without tiers show base pricing row
Duration dropdown has: 2 Days, 3 Days, 5 Days, 7 Days, 10 Days, 14 Days, 21 Days, 1 Month, 3 Months, 6 Months, Annual
Add Tier button (+) adds new tier to program
Tier count changed from 15 to 14 after delete test
Add Program button creates new program
Add Session button creates new session
Save All button persists changes with success toast 'All pricing saved!'
Sessions table columns: Session, Show, AED, INR, USD, Offer AED, Offer INR, Offer USD, Offer Badge
DurationTier model has offer_price_aed, offer_price_inr, offer_price_usd, offer_text fields
Session model has offer_price_aed, offer_price_inr, offer_price_usd, offer_text fields
Program model has show_pricing_on_card, show_tiers_on_card fields
show_pricing_on_card toggle works via API - hides pricing on homepage card when false
show_tiers_on_card toggle works via API - hides tier selector when false (requires is_flagship=true)

homepage_programs_title.fix: Update via Admin > Homepage tab or PUT /api/settings

database_config_issue.description: Homepage 'Programs' section title needs to be changed from 'Flagship Programs' to 'Programs'
database_config_issue.fix_method: Admin Panel > Homepage tab > Programs section > Edit title, OR API PUT /api/settings with updated homepage_sections
